name: Pumpkin Muffins from Helen Kemp
recipeIngredient: 8 packets Equal or Sweet and Low
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 12-muffin tin with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Fill the muffin tin evenly with the batter.
4. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the muffins to cool before serving.
Weight Watchers Info: 6 muffins = 1 Bread, 1 Protein, 1 Vegetable, 1 Fat, 1 Milk
